title: Vex
description: Semantic version control for BIM and IFC models, built around meaningful model diffs instead of file-level noise.

title: vex-bridge
description: Local daemon and API bridge that lets CAD integrations push BIM data through secure localhost workflows.

title: Vex Atlas
description: Cloud system that manages users' actions on Vex: repository metadata, auth, SSH key registry, device pairing, vex-serve callbacks, and browser semantic diff review.
